name: Friendly Finance of Fort Worth
description_short: Privately owned consumer finance firm in Fort Worth offering personal installment loans up to $1,600 with flexible credit requirements and community-focused service.
description_long:
Friendly Finance of Fort Worth is a privately owned consumer finance company operating from a single location at 1947 8th Avenue in Fort Worth, Texas. The company was established to serve the local community's short-term and medium-term personal financing needs. With a focus on accessibility and personalized service, they position themselves as a family-oriented alternative to larger financial institutions.

The company specializes exclusively in personal installment loans, explicitly avoiding payday loans and title loans. They offer loans up to $1,600 and emphasize that applicants do not need a perfect credit score to qualify. Their stated lending purposes include vehicle repairs, home improvements, medical expenses, and other unexpected costs. The application process is described as straightforward, with customers invited to call or visit the office in person to apply. They offer financial consultation to help borrowers identify loan plans matching their specific budget and needs.

Friendly Finance distinguishes itself through community emphasis and customer service orientation. They advertise a welcoming atmosphere, treatment of customers as family members, and willingness to "go the extra mile." The company operates Monday through Friday, 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM, by appointment only. Their marketing emphasizes trust, affordability, and being responsive to life's unexpected financial challenges rather than promoting themselves as a high-volume lender.

As a small, single-location lender with limited public documentation on their website, prospective borrowers should note that specific terms, APR ranges, repayment periods, and underwriting criteria are not disclosed online. While they market flexibility around credit scores, actual approval odds and rates depend on individual circumstances. The appointment-only model and limited hours may be inconvenient for some applicants.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Explicitly does not offer payday loans or title loans—focuses on installment loans only
Advertises flexible credit requirements; states perfect credit score not necessary for approval
Loan amounts up to $1,600 provide meaningful funds for emergency expenses beyond micro-loans
Offers free financial consultation to discuss loan plans tailored to individual budgets
Privately owned local business with stated community focus and family-oriented customer service
In-person application option available at physical office location
Clear statement of business purpose as consumer finance, not predatory lending
cons: No disclosure of interest rates, APR ranges, or typical loan terms on website
Appointment-only model limits accessibility compared to lenders with flexible walk-in hours
Single physical location in Fort Worth may be inconvenient for applicants outside the area
No online application or loan pre-qualification tool available
Limited public information about approval criteria, repayment options, or loan features
best_for: Fort Worth area residents needing $500–$1,600 for unexpected vehicle, home, or medical expenses
Borrowers with fair or poor credit seeking installment loans without payday/title loan terms
Customers who prefer in-person service and face-to-face financial consultation
diagnosis: Friendly Finance of Fort Worth is best for Fort Worth-area residents needing $500–$1,600 in personal installment loans who prefer working with a local, community-focused lender and don't mind scheduling an appointment. The main caveat is that critical loan terms—APR, repayment period, and actual approval criteria—are not disclosed online, requiring direct contact to evaluate whether their rates and terms are competitive.
services: Financial consultation and loan plan customization
In-person loan applications at office location
Customer service focused on budget-appropriate loan matching
Lending to applicants with less-than-perfect credit scores
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
meta_description: Privately owned consumer finance firm in Fort Worth offering personal installment loans up to $1,600 with flexible credit and community service.
